parameters.value: {'api_name': '获取待申诉列表', 'path': '/api/products/admin/appeals/', 'method': 'GET', 'content_type': 'application/json', 'auth_required': True, 'auth_type': 'admin', 'headers': {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36', 'Accept': 'application/json, text/plain, */*', 'Accept-Language': 'zh-CN,zh;q=0.9', 'X-CSRFToken': 'Qude8lFDdohMJxC0f3tOpC8OiXu3Imqn8l9YUXqEhSIBQlMwwl4vZCnR1OCzO4VJ'}, 'module': 'admin', 'source_file': 'appeal_list.yaml', 'id': 'TC-ADMIN-019-5', 'name': '验证证据照片数据结构', 'description': '验证申诉中的证据照片数据结构正确', 'data': {}, 'path_params': {}, 'query_params': {}, 'files': {}, 'expected': {'status_code': 200, 'check_points': ['isinstance(resp_json, list)', 'len(resp_json) > 0', "isinstance(resp_json[0].get('evidence_photos', []), list)", "isinstance(resp_json[0].get('appeal_evidence_photos', []), list)", "len(resp_json[0].get('evidence_photos', [])) == 0 or ('name' in resp_json[0]['evidence_photos'][0] and 'url' in resp_json[0]['evidence_photos'][0])", "len(resp_json[0].get('appeal_evidence_photos', [])) == 0 or ('name' in resp_json[0]['appeal_evidence_photos'][0] and 'url' in resp_json[0]['appeal_evidence_photos'][0])"]}, 'setup': [], 'teardown': [], 'tags': ['regression', 'p2', '管理员', '数据验证']}
